app.title: EdgeLens
app.tagline: Browser-based image analyzer — your images never leave your device.
dropzone.title: Drop an image here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse
error.fileTooLarge: File exceeds the 50 MB size limit.
error.unsupportedFormat: Unsupported format. Please use JPEG or PNG.
pixelInspector.title: Pixel Inspector
pixelInspector.placeholder: Hover over the image to inspect pixels.
histogram.title: Histogram
histogram.placeholder: Load an image to view its histogram.
cookie.message: EdgeLens uses analytics cookies to improve the app. No image data is collected.
